reasons: Acceptance criterion 'Report contains stages, artifacts, timing' passed: full test suite and direct runtime check verified pipeline_report.json includes artifact='pipeline_report', stages array, timing_ms, and final_video_artifact metadata.

Acceptance criterion 'Final video exists' passed when produced by stage outputs: direct runtime pipeline execution with explicit final stage artifact confirmed final_video path exists and is referenced in report.
Acceptance criterion 'No artifact mutation' passed: ensureFinalVideoMp4 was invoked against an existing final_video and file mtime remained unchanged in behavioral validation.
Verification steps 'Run pipeline' and 'Inspect report' passed with real execution evidence from npm tests and direct runPipeline report inspection.
run_commands: cd projects/pipeline-runner && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const {runPipeline}=require('./src/runner/run-pipeline');const dir=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'pr-w4-'));const video=path.join(dir,'in.mp4');const out=path.join(dir,'runtime');fs.writeFileSync(video,Buffer.from([1,2,3]));const finalRel=path.join('stages','final','final_video.mp4');const r=runPipeline({videoPath:video,outputDir:out,stages:[{id:'ingest_like',run:(ctx)=>{fs.mkdirSync(path.join(ctx.outputDir,'stages','ingest'),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(path.join(ctx.outputDir,'stages','ingest','input_video_ref.json'),JSON.stringify({video_path:ctx.videoPath}));return {ok:true};}},{id:'final_stage',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts.final_video;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p,'final-by-stage');return {ok:true};}}]});if(!r.ok){console.error('pipeline_failed');process.exit(2);}const rp=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(r.pipeline_report_path,'utf8'));if(rp.artifact!=='pipeline_report'||!Array.isArray(rp.stages)||!rp.timing_ms||rp.final_video_artifact.relative_path!==finalRel){console.error('bad_report');process.exit(3);}const finalPath=path.join(out,finalRel);if(!fs.existsSync(finalPath)){console.error('missing_final');process.exit(4);}const m1=fs.statSync(finalPath).mtimeMs;const {ensureFinalVideoMp4}=require('./src/report/ensure-final-video');ensureFinalVideoMp4(out);const m2=fs.statSync(finalPath).mtimeMs;if(m1!==m2){console.error('mutated_final');process.exit(5);}console.log('ok');"
summary: Validated work_4_report_and_outputs using both automated tests and direct runtime behavioral verification. Current implementation satisfies reporting requirements, requires stage-produced final video, and preserves no-mutation behavior for existing final artifacts.
